price: und diejenigen, die schwerwiegende Sünden und Abscheulichkeiten meiden und, wenn sie zornig sind, (doch) vergeben,
arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَجۡتَنِبُونَ كَبَٰٓئِرَ ٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡفَوَٰحِشَ وَإِذَا مَا غَضِبُواْ هُمۡ يَغۡفِرُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wa-alladhīna yajtanibūna kabāira al-ith'mi wal-fawāḥisha wa-idhā mā ghaḍibū hum yaghfirūna
